title: Define Trickle-suppression-safe neighbor liveness policy
description: Implement a policy (likely method on NeighborTable or new struct) that determines if a neighbor is still alive considering Trickle suppression (heard_consistent increments counter preventing transmits). Must be safe against premature eviction in dense networks where DIOs are suppressed.
close_reason: Trickle-suppression-safe neighbor liveness policy defined and integrated into prune path. No subbeads created per instructions.
